---
title: "Using the capr CLI"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Using the capr CLI}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

```{r}
library(capR)
script <- system.file("exec", "capr", package = "capR")
stopifnot(file.exists(script))
script
```

Portable automation invokes the wrapper with `Rscript`:

```sh
Rscript /path/to/capr digest \
  --input orders.csv --output artifacts --label orders --budget 500
Rscript /path/to/capr run-fixtures --output capr-conformance.json
```

The wrapper accepts CSV/JSON files, calls public APIs, emits deterministic JSON,
and rejects arbitrary R source. See `docs/cli.md` for exit codes.
